event: The Betrothal of Raphael and the Niece of Cardinal Bibbiena
description: An interior scene showing a cardinal in red robes and red cap standing at center, joining the hands of a young man in green at left and a young woman in dark burgundy at right. The cardinal faces the viewer while facilitating the handclasp between the couple. The setting is an elegant Renaissance interior with dark curtains, and another figure is visible in the background. The young man gazes at the woman while she looks slightly downward. The composition is formally balanced with the cardinal as the central mediating figure.

_meta.title: The Betrothal of Raphael and the Niece of Cardinal Bibbiena
